name: Grilled Apple Reduction
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith apples; cored and sliced into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Rub each slice with olive oil and season with Essence.
3. Grill for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until nice grill marks are apparent. Remove from grill and julienne slices.
4. In a saucepan, add 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
5. Add the apples and shallots and sauté for 1 minute.
6. Add the red wine and veal reduction. Bring the liquid to a boil, then reduce to a simmer. Simmer for 2-3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
7. To assemble: Mound the bourbon mash in the center of the platter. Fan the venison over the bourbon mash. Spoon the apple reduction around the plate. Garnish with sweet potato nests, chives, and peppers.
